name: Nepal Police (Emergency)
description: General police assistance and emergency reporting.

name: Fire Brigade (Kathmandu)
description: Kathmandu central fire station for immediate fire emergencies.

name: Nepal Red Cross Society (Ambulance)
description: Ambulance service and emergency medical transport.

name: Traffic Police (Emergency)
description: Reporting road accidents, traffic jams, and transit violations.

name: Child Helpline Nepal
description: Helpline for children in risk, domestic violence, or abuse cases.

name: National Emergency Operation Center (NEOC)
description: Disaster monitoring, earthquake coordination, and flood relief updates.

name: Nepal Electricity Authority (NEA)
description: Reporting power outages, electrical faults, and live wire dangers.

name: Mental Health Helpline Nepal
description: 24/7 free mental health support, crisis counselling, and suicide prevention.

name: Kathmandu Upatyaka Khanepani Limited (KUKL)
description: Water supply issues, pipeline leaks, and emergency distribution.

name: National Human Rights Commission (NHRC)
description: Reporting human rights violations and discrimination.

name: Patan Hospital (Emergency Department)
description: Emergency services, trauma care, and clinical facilities.

name: Nepal Red Cross Blood Bank
description: Emergency blood supply, donor coordination, and inventory checking.
